sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68504" key="monognwme/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-γνωμέω</orth>, <sense id="n68504.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be self-willed, wayward</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:222" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">222</biblScope> </bibl> (leg. -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γνωμονέω</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
